render.en: This is my hand and this is your head.
render.pt: Esta é minha mão e esta é sua cabeça.

render.en: She is my mom and he is my dad.

render.de: Sie ist meine Mutter und er ist mein Vater.
render.el: Αυτή είναι η μαμά μου και αυτός είναι ο μπαμπάς μου.

render.ko: 그녀는 제 엄마이고 그는 제 아빠예요.

render.en: He eats breakfast but not lunch.

render.en: He eats dinner with his mom because he is home.
